items.name: Wings
items.description:
Unleash your power with wings forged from Adurite and Black Iron — a bold combination of ancient sparkle and hardened metal. These dual-metal wings blend vintage Roblox design with high-impact aesthetic, perfect for elite avatars, battle role-play, flying maps, and exclusive accessory collectors.

🪽 More Colors: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=wings&Category=18&Subcategory=66&CreatorName=Classic+Limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1
